name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvAcrdtnExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_base AS (SELECT P.SRC_SYS_CD, P.PROV_ID, P.PROV_ACRDTN_SEQ_NO, P.PROV_ACRDTN_DESC FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_ACRDTN_D P WHERE P.PROV_ACRDTN_EXPRTN_DT_SK >= '@{pipeline().parameters.CurrentDate}' AND (P.PROV_ACRDTN_STTUS_DESC = 'ACCREDITED' OR P.PROV_ACRDTN_DESC = 'NON ACCREDITED') AND P.PROV_ACRDTN_SK NOT IN (1,0)) SELECT PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, PROV_ACRDTN_SEQ_NO AS ACRDTN_SEQ_NO, SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, PROV_ACRDTN_DESC AS ACRDTN_DESC, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdtDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte_base

PROCESSING:   Retrieves the data from EDW PROV_ACRDTN_D table and loads into the Web Provider Directory database

Annotations:
Write PROV_DIR_DM_PROV_ACRDTN Data into a Sequential file for Load Job IdsEdwProvDirDmProvAcrdtnLoad.
Read from source table PROV_ACRDTN_D, from EDW. Apply Run Cycle filters to get just the needed rows forward
Add Defaults
Job Name: EdwProvDirDmProvAcrdtnExtr
